items.title: Mbappé critical of tactics in loss by 'sloppy' Fra...
items.summary: Kylian Mbappé seemed to question Didier Deschamps' approach and tactics after France's 2-0 defeat to Spain in the FIFA World Cup semifinal Tuesday.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Women's final tops ESPN Wimbledon viewership
items.summary: The Wimbledon women's final averaged 1.9 million viewers, an increase of 48% over last year, while the men's final averaged 2.4 million, down 16%.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Vince's century, Baker's five takes Hampshire to another Finals Day
items.summary: Vince's 125 set Essex a target of 212 before Baker knocked them down in a one-sided quarter-final
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
